# Data Model: gcam_apo


GCAM Guiding and Centering Data for APO for a given MJD

- [Basic Information](#basic-information)

## Basic Information
GCAM Guiding and Centering Data for APO for a given MJD

### Naming Convention
$GCAM_DATA_N/[MJD]/gcam-[MJD].fits

### Releases
IPL4

### Enviroments
GCAM_DATA_N

### Approximate Size
182 KB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
sdsscore

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
1.3.1

### HDUS List for release IPL4
  - [HDU0: PRIMARY](#hdu0-primary)
  - [HDU1](#hdu1)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example HDUS List

### HDU0: PRIMARY
Primary HDU

#### HDU Type: IMAGE
#### HDU Size:  0 bytes

##### Header Table Caption for HDU0
Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SIMPLE | True | conforms to FITS standard |
| BITPIX | 8 | array data type |
| NAXIS | 0 | number of array dimensions |
| EXTEND | True |  |



### HDU1: 
GCAM Guiding and Centering Data

#### HDU Type: BINARY TABLE
#### HDU Size:  173 KB

##### Header Table Caption for HDU1
Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| XTENSION | BINTABLE | binary table extension |
| BITPIX | 8 | array data type |
| NAXIS | 2 | number of array dimensions |
| NAXIS1 | 165 | length of dimension 1 |
| NAXIS2 | 1078 | length of dimension 2 |
| PCOUNT | 0 | number of group parameters |
| GCOUNT | 1 | number of groups |
| TFIELDS | 20 | number of table fields |
| TDIM19 | (6) |  |
| TDIM20 | (6) |  |

##### Binary Table Caption for HDU1
Name | Type | Unit | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
 | indx | int32 |  | Index of guider image |
 | date-obs | char[21] |  | Time of the start of the exposure [TAI] |
 | mjd | float64 |  | Modified Julian Date of the start of the exposure |
 | ra | float64 | degree | RA of telescope boresight |
 | dec | float64 | degree | Dec of telescope boresight |
 | az | float64 | degree | Azimuth axis pos. (approx) |
 | alt | float64 | degree | Altitude axis pos. (approx) |
 | ipa | float64 | degree | Rotator axis pos. (approx) |
 | focus | float64 | micron | User-specified focus offset |
 | gdrms | float32 | arcsec | Guide RMS |
 | dRA | float32 | arcsec | RA measured delta |
 | dDec | float32 | arcsec | Dec measured delta |
 | dRot | float32 | degree | Rot measured delta |
 | dScale | float32 |  | Scale measured factor |
 | corrRA | float32 | arcsec | RA applied correction |
 | corrDec | float32 | arcsec | Dec applied correction |
 | corrRot | float32 | arcsec | Rot applied correction |
 | corrScale | float32 |  | Scale applied correction |
 | nstars | int32[6] |  | Number of fit guide stars per camera |
 | fwhm | float32[6] | arcsec | measured full width half max of sources per camera |



---
